title: [DEPRECATED] [MTR4] MTR CRRC Qingdao Sifang EMU (Q-Train)
description: MTR Q-Train for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, retextured from the mod's default C-Train.
body:
# Introduction
This resource pack _finally_ features the MTR CRRC Qingdao Sifang EMU (Q-Train; or MTR Urban Lines Vision Train) for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.

# Content
- MTR CRRC Qingdao Sifang EMU (Q-Train)

# Important Note
**This resource pack requires Minecraft Transit Railway version 4.0.0 or above!**
